title: JP Spares, keeping you moving since 1988
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Founded in 1988 as a small...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Founded in 1988 as a small family business, JP Spares has grown into a trusted name in the automotive industry.


> For more than 30 years, the company has built its reputation on honesty, quality parts and exceptional customer service.


From day one, JP Spares has put people first. Many of its earliest customers remain loyal today, a testament to the trust earned through dedication and personal care. With over 30 passionate team members, the business combines product knowledge with genuine commitment to building lasting customer relationships.

What sets JP Spares apart is its 'solutions-first' approach. If a part isn't on the shelf, the team will source it quickly and efficiently, ensuring customers always find what they need.

Their wide product range, from everyday essentials to rare components, makes them a go-to supplier for both car owners and motor professionals. Competitive pricing further guarantees value without compromising quality.

Guided by the motto 'Our customer is king', JP Spares delivers more than just parts - it provides peace of mind.

Whether it's keeping a family car running smoothly or supporting the motor trade, customers know they'll receive care, attention and respect at every visit.

The company's excellence has been recognised with three Best of George Awards, celebrating its ongoing contribution to the community.

Looking ahead, JP Spares remains committed to its founding values while continuing to expand and improve, ensuring generations to come can rely on the same trusted service.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
